Although determining the exact conditions under which a vulnerability in a third-party component may affect a dependent program remains a challenging problem, a first robust approximation can be obtained by considering the reachability of the vulnerable code from the parent program. Based on this observation, the main goal of this work is to assess the improvement that code reachability information can offer in the precision of vulnerability triage for C/C++ programs. To that end, we developed VPChecker, a system that i) captures the dependencies of a program at the granularity of individual functions, and ii) localizes CVEs in shared libraries to the corresponding functions that contain the flaw. Using VPChecker, we conducted a large-scale vulnerability assessment of the Debian Linux ecosystem. The results of our cross-examination of over 24,000 C/C++ binaries (shipped by more than 6,600 Debian packages) with 510 CVEs in shared libraries, show that function-level reachability information reduces the number of ELF binaries reported as affected by a particular CVE by 28% on average, while reducing the number of CVEs reported as affecting a particular ELF binary by 30%.
title_zh: 供应链反应：利用代码可达性信息提升漏洞优先级判定的准确性
abstract_zh: 软件物料清单（SBOM）已成为大规模漏洞分析中的关键组成部分。现有的SBOM方法通常以软件包或二进制可执行文件为粒度，对程序依赖关系的描述过于粗略且缺乏上下文信息。因此，当第三方组件存在漏洞时，现有SBOM工具会无差别地报告该漏洞需进行修复，而不论目标程序是否真正受到该漏洞的影响。尽管准确判断第三方组件中的漏洞是否会影响某个依赖程序仍是一个极具挑战性的问题，但通过分析漏洞代码是否可被主程序访问，可以实现一个初步且稳健的近似判断。基于这一观察，本文的主要目标是评估代码可达性信息在提升C/C++程序漏洞分析精度方面的改进效果。为此，我们开发了VPChecker系统，该系统具备两个核心功能：i）以单个函数为粒度捕获程序的依赖关系；ii）将共享库中的CVE定位到具体包含缺陷的函数。利用VPChecker，我们对Debian Linux生态系统的海量程序进行了大规模漏洞评估。通过对超过24,000个C/C++二进制文件（由6,600多个Debian软件包提供）与510个共享库中的CVE进行交叉验证，结果表明：基于函数级别的可达性信息，平均可使被特定CVE标记为受影响的ELF二进制文件数量减少28%，同时使被特定ELF二进制文件标记为受影响的CVE数量减少30%。

title: An empirical comparison of data transformation techniques for clustering-based unsupervised software defect prediction
authors: Zhengxiang Chen, Zhiqiang Li, Hongyu Zhang, Jie Ren, Feng Tian
abstract: As a key pre-processing step of software defect prediction, data transformation techniques aim to eliminate dimensional inconsistencies among software metrics and improve model performance. However, the impact of data transformation techniques on the performance of clustering-based unsupervised defect prediction (UDP) has not been fully explored. To this end, our aim is to empirically investigate the effect of data transformation techniques on the performance of clustering-based UDP models. In this paper, we systematically evaluated 23 unsupervised clustering models under 4 data conditions: (1) raw untransformed data (original), (2) logarithmic transformation, (3) z-score standardization, and (4) min-max normalization. Our experimental design consists of two dimensions: comparative analysis of individual models’ performance before and after data transformation and evaluation of relative performance across different models under various transformations. Extensive experiments conducted on 22 software projects indicate that: (1) Data transformation techniques have significant potential to improve the performance of unsupervised clustering models. They achieve improvements of 6.9% -22.9% in AUC,10.7% -41.6% in MCC, and 3.1% -12.27% in F_measure@20%. However, these transformations lead to a degradation in IFA performance, which inevitably increases code inspection efforts but within tolerable operational thresholds. (2) The performance of unsupervised clustering models varies depending on the data transformation techniques used, with no single clustering model showing consistent superiority. Empirical findings indicate that data transformation techniques exhibit general effectiveness in clustering-based UDP models, and the choice of an unsupervised clustering model should align with the specific data transformation technique employed.
title_zh: 基于聚类的无监督软件缺陷预测中数据变换技术的实证比较
abstract_zh: 作为软件缺陷预测中的关键预处理步骤，数据变换技术旨在消除软件度量之间的维度不一致性，从而提升模型性能。然而，数据变换技术对基于聚类的无监督缺陷预测（UDP）模型性能的影响尚未得到充分研究。为此，本文旨在通过实证方法探究数据变换技术对基于聚类的无监督缺陷预测模型性能的影响。本文系统评估了23种无监督聚类模型在四种数据条件下的表现：（1）原始未变换数据（原始数据），（2）对数变换，（3）z-score标准化，以及（4）最小-最大归一化。实验设计包含两个维度：一是比较各模型在数据变换前后性能的变化，二是评估不同模型在各种变换条件下的相对表现。在22个软件项目上开展的大量实验表明：（1）数据变换技术显著提升了无监督聚类模型的性能，AUC提升6.9%–22.9%，MCC提升10.7%–41.6%，F_measure@20%提升3.1%–12.27%。然而，这些变换导致IFA性能下降，不可避免地增加了代码审查的工作量，但仍在可接受的操作阈值范围内。（2）无监督聚类模型的性能表现因所采用的数据变换技术而异，不存在在所有情况下均表现最优的单一聚类模型。实证结果表明，数据变换技术在基于聚类的UDP模型中具有普遍有效性，因此在选择无监督聚类模型时，应与所采用的具体数据变换技术相匹配。

title: Chart2Code-MoLA: Efficient Multi-Modal Code Generation via Adaptive Expert Routing
authors: Yifei Wang, Jacky Keung, Zhenyu Mao, Jingyu Zhang, Yuchen Cao
abstract: Chart-to-code generation is a critical task in automated data visualization, translating complex chart structures into executable programs. While recent Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) improve chart representation, existing approaches still struggle to achieve cross-type generalization, memory efficiency, and modular design. To address these challenges, this paper proposes C2C-MolA, a multimodal framework that synergizes Mixture of Experts (MoE) with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). The MoE component uses a complexity-aware routing mechanism with domain-specialized experts and load-balanced sparse gating, dynamically allocating inputs based on learnable structural metrics like element count and chart complexity. LoRA enables parameter-efficient updates for resource-conscious tuning, further supported by a tailored training strategy that aligns routing stability with semantic accuracy. Experiments on Chart2Code-160k show that the proposed model improves generation accuracy by up to 17%, reduces peak GPU memory by 18%, and accelerates convergence by 20%, when compared to standard fine-tuning and LoRAonly baselines, particularly on complex charts. Ablation studies validate optimal designs, such as 8 experts and rank-8 LoRA, and confirm scalability for real-world multimodal code generation.
title_zh: Chart2Code-MoLA：通过自适应专家路由实现高效的多模态代码生成
abstract_zh: 图表到代码的生成是自动化数据可视化中的关键任务，它将复杂的图表结构转化为可执行的程序代码。尽管近期的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在图表表示方面取得了进展，但现有方法在跨类型泛化能力、内存效率以及模块化设计方面仍面临挑战。为解决这些问题，本文提出了一种名为C2C-MolA的多模态框架，该框架将专家混合（Mixture of Experts, MoE）与低秩适配（Low-Rank Adaptation, LoRA）相结合。MoE组件采用基于复杂度感知的路由机制，配备领域专用专家和负载均衡的稀疏门控机制，能够根据可学习的结构度量（如元素数量和图表复杂度）动态分配输入。LoRA则实现了参数高效的更新，适用于资源受限的微调场景，并辅以专门设计的训练策略，使路由稳定性与语义准确性相协调。在Chart2Code-160k数据集上的实验表明，与标准微调和仅使用LoRA的基线方法相比，所提出的模型在生成准确率上最高提升17%，峰值GPU内存降低18%，收敛速度加快20%，尤其在复杂图表上的表现更为显著。消融实验验证了最优设计选择，如采用8个专家和秩为8的LoRA，并证实了该方法在真实世界多模态代码生成任务中的可扩展性。

title: Modeling and Evaluating Self-Repair in FPGA-Based UAV Embedded Systems
authors: Mohamed Sedik Chebout, Toufik Marir, Farid Mokhati
publish: 2025 Fourth International Conference on Theoretical and Applicative Aspects of Computer Science (ICTAACS)
abstract: Ensuring resilience in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) requires autonomous mechanisms capable of detecting, diagnosing, and recovering from both hardware and software faults during flight. This paper presents an extended mathematical framework for quantifying self-repair capability in FPGA-based embedded UAV systems. The model integrates four core self-X activities namely self-monitoring, self-diagnosing, self-configuring, and self-optimizing, and introduces additional UAV-specific resilience metrics, including Detection Latency (Ldet), Diagnosis Time (TMD), Reconfiguration Success (SRc), Quality of Recovery (QoR), and Flight Safety (SRsafe). A comprehensive dataset of 30 representative UAV faults, spanning sensor, actuator, communication, software, power, and FPGA layers, is used to evaluate the framework. Eight frequent and critical faults are selected for detailed assessment. A numerical and experimental case study focusing on a barometric sensor drift fault is conducted on a Xilinx Zynq-based UAV. The results show significant improvements in detection latency, diagnostic responsiveness, and reconfiguration time, achieving a self-repair effectiveness of 90% in the evaluated scenario. The proposed approach provides a quantitative foundation for assessing UAV resilience and supports future extensions toward real-time fault injection, cooperative resilience in multi-UAV missions, and AI-based predictive fault management.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的无人机嵌入式系统中的自修复建模与评估
abstract_zh: 确保无人飞行器（UAV）的韧性需要具备在飞行过程中自主检测、诊断并从硬件和软件故障中恢复的机制。本文提出了一种扩展的数学框架，用于量化基于FPGA的嵌入式UAV系统中的自修复能力。该模型整合了四项核心的自X（self-X）活动：自监控、自诊断、自配置和自优化，并引入了若干UAV特定的韧性指标，包括检测延迟（Ldet）、诊断时间（TMD）、重构成功率（SRc）、恢复质量（QoR）以及飞行安全性（SRsafe）。为评估该框架，本文使用了一个包含30种典型UAV故障的综合数据集，覆盖传感器、执行器、通信、软件、电源及FPGA等多个层级。从中选取了八种常见且关键的故障进行深入分析。以基于Xilinx Zynq的UAV为平台，针对气压传感器漂移故障开展了一项数值与实验相结合的案例研究。结果表明，该方法在检测延迟、诊断响应速度和重构时间方面均取得显著改善，在所评估场景中实现了90%的自修复有效性。所提出的方案为评估UAV韧性提供了定量基础，并为未来向实时故障注入、多UAV协同韧性以及基于人工智能的预测性故障管理等方向拓展提供了支持。

title: Optimizing Code Feature Extraction and Classification using Random Forest Models on Abstract Syntax Trees
authors: Saad Faheem Khan Pattan, Sreya Mynampati, Sudharson S
publish: 2025 IEEE 9th International Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT)
abstract: The machine learning methods applied to code classification tasks that use Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) features has been explored in this study. The dataset includes parsed AST representations of more than 100,000 Python scripts, which we then applied to feature extraction. We aim to optimize Random Forest classifiers to classify code from the associated extracted features that have been created. To alleviate some of the computing overhead and train the model efficiently, we padded features, and capped the dataset to 20,000 entries. In addition, we used GridSearchCV to optimize hyperparameters by finding the best combinations of hyperparameters for the dataset. After we fine tune the framework parameters, we measured performance metrics of the model including: accuracy, precision, and recall. The final model was tuned to 50 estimators, maximum depth of 10, and minimum of 2 sample split. From our model evaluation of performance on the validation data, we had results of 90%, 89%, and 90% for accuracy, precision, and recall respectively. In addition to classification tasks we provided visual analysis and discussion using confusion matrices, precision-recall curves, and feature importances to analyze model behavior and other areas for improvement. This study highlights the challenges of using AST-based features for code classification and identifies avenues for further optimization including improvements to our feature extraction process and the selection of models.
title_zh: 基于抽象语法树的随机森林模型在代码特征提取与分类中的优化
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了在代码分类任务中应用基于抽象语法树（AST）特征的机器学习方法。数据集包含超过10万条Python脚本的解析AST表示，我们随后基于这些表示进行了特征提取。我们的目标是优化随机森林分类器，利用所提取的特征对代码进行分类。为减轻部分计算开销并高效训练模型，我们对特征进行了填充处理，并将数据集规模限制在20,000条记录。此外，我们采用GridSearchCV方法，通过寻找最适合该数据集的超参数组合来优化模型超参数。在完成框架参数的微调后，我们评估了模型的多项性能指标，包括准确率、精确率和召回率。最终模型的最优配置为：50个估计器、最大深度为10、最小分裂样本数为2。在验证数据上的模型评估结果显示，准确率、精确率和召回率分别达到90%、89%和90%。除了分类任务外，我们还通过混淆矩阵、精确率-召回率曲线以及特征重要性分析，提供了可视化分析与讨论，以深入理解模型行为并识别潜在的改进方向。本研究揭示了基于AST特征进行代码分类所面临的挑战，并指出了未来优化的可能路径，包括改进特征提取流程以及优化模型选择策略。

title: IPSO: An Improved Particle Swarm Optimization-Based Method for Test Case Generation
authors: Peng Wang, Shunhui Ji, Yikun Guo, Pengcheng Zhang
abstract: Rapid advancement of DNNs has exposed significant vulnerabilities to NLP software defects, raising critical security concerns. Researchers have proposed various automated testing techniques to generate adversarial test cases. However, existing methods have two limitations: poor quality test cases and inefficiency in time. To address these issues, we propose IPSO, an automated test case generation method integrating word scoring via Locality Sensitive Hashing (LSH) and adaptive probability mutation. The method firstly performs synonym substitution on the influential positions of the test case via word score selection and initializes the high-quality particle swarm. Then, by considering the fitness function of confidence, change rate and semantic perplexity, the test cases are evaluated and constrained comprehensively to improve the quality of the generated test cases. Finally, adaptive probability mutation is adopted to prevent the particle swarm from falling into local optima. Experiments on three datasets and five DNN models show that IPSO consistently has the highest success rate and generates semantically coherent test cases with at least $\mathbf{5 0. 5}$ % less time overhead than heuristic baselines. For example, in the IMDB dataset, IPSO reduces query numbers by 87.7% compared to traditional PSO.
title_zh: IPSO：一种基于改进粒子群优化的测试用例生成方法
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNNs）的快速发展暴露了自然语言处理（NLP）软件中的显著漏洞，引发了严峻的安全隐患。研究人员提出了多种自动化测试技术以生成对抗性测试用例。然而，现有方法存在两大局限：生成的测试用例质量较差，且耗时效率低下。为解决这些问题，本文提出IPS0，一种结合局部敏感哈希（LSH）词项评分与自适应概率变异的自动化测试用例生成方法。该方法首先通过词项评分选择对测试用例影响较大的位置进行同义词替换，并初始化高质量的粒子群。随后，综合考虑置信度、变化率和语义困惑度的适应度函数，对测试用例进行全面评估与约束，从而提升生成用例的质量。最后，采用自适应概率变异策略，防止粒子群陷入局部最优。在三个数据集和五种DNN模型上的实验表明，IPS0始终具有最高的成功率，且生成的测试用例在语义上保持连贯，相比启发式基线方法，时间开销至少降低50.5%。例如，在IMDB数据集上，IPS0相比传统粒子群优化（PSO）减少了87.7%的查询次数。

title: Safety Guardrails for LLM-Enabled Robots
authors: Zachary Ravichandran, Alexander Robey, Vijay Kumar, George J. Pappas, Hamed Hassani
abstract: Although the integration of large language models (LLMs) into robotics has unlocked transformative capabilities, it has also introduced significant safety concerns, ranging from average-case LLM errors (e.g., hallucinations) to adversarial jailbreaking attacks, which can produce harmful robot behavior in real-world settings. Traditional robot safety approaches do not address the contextual vulnerabilities of LLMs, and current LLM safety approaches overlook the physical risks posed by robots operating in real-world environments. To ensure the safety of LLM-enabled robots, we propose RoboGuard, a two-stage guardrail architecture. RoboGuard first contextualizes pre-defined safety rules by grounding them in the robot's environment using a root-of-trust LLM. This LLM is shielded from malicious prompts and employs chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to generate context-dependent safety specifications, such as temporal logic constraints. RoboGuard then resolves conflicts between these contextual safety specifications and potentially unsafe plans using temporal logic control synthesis, ensuring compliance while minimally violating user preferences. In simulation and real-world experiments that consider worst-case jailbreaking attacks, RoboGuard reduces the execution of unsafe plans from over 92% to below 3% without compromising performance on safe plans. We also demonstrate that RoboGuard is resource-efficient, robust against adaptive attacks, and enhanced by its root-of-trust LLM's CoT reasoning. These results demonstrate the potential of RoboGuard to mitigate the safety risks and enhance the reliability of LLM-enabled robots.
title_zh: 用于大语言模型赋能机器人的安全护栏
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）与机器人技术的融合开启了变革性的能力，但也带来了显著的安全隐患，从常规的LLM错误（如幻觉）到对抗性越狱攻击，这些都可能导致机器人在现实环境中产生有害行为。传统的机器人安全方法无法应对LLM的上下文脆弱性，而现有的LLM安全方法则忽视了机器人在真实环境中运行所引发的物理风险。为确保LLM赋能机器人的安全性，我们提出了**RoboGuard**——一种两阶段防护架构。RoboGuard首先通过使用可信根（root-of-trust）LLM将预设的安全规则与机器人所处环境进行语境化关联，从而生成依赖上下文的安全规范，例如时序逻辑约束。该可信根LLM能够抵御恶意提示，并利用思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）推理机制，动态生成适应环境变化的安全规则。随后，RoboGuard采用时序逻辑控制综合技术，解决这些上下文相关的安全规范与潜在不安全行为规划之间的冲突，在确保安全合规的同时，最大限度地保留用户偏好。在模拟和真实世界实验中，即使面对最坏情况的越狱攻击，RoboGuard也能将不安全行为的执行率从超过92%降低至不足3%，同时不损害安全行为的执行性能。我们还证明，RoboGuard具有资源高效、对自适应攻击具备鲁棒性，并且其可信根LLM的CoT推理能力进一步提升了整体防护效果。这些结果表明，RoboGuard在缓解LLM赋能机器人的安全风险、提升其可靠性方面具有巨大潜力。

title: MICRORACER: Detecting Concurrency Bugs for Cloud Service Systems
authors: Zhiling Deng, Juepeng Wang, Zhuangbin Chen
abstract: Modern cloud applications delivering global services are often built on distributed systems with a microservice architecture. In such systems, end-to-end user requests traverse multiple different services and machines, exhibiting intricate interactions. Consequently, cloud service systems are vulnerable to concurrency bugs, which pose significant challenges to their reliability. Existing methods for concurrency bug detection often fall short due to their intrusive nature and inability to handle the architectural complexities of microservices. To address these limitations, we propose Microracer, a non-intrusive and automated framework for detecting concurrency bugs in such environments. By dynamically instrumenting widely-used libraries at runtime, Microracer collects detailed trace data without modifying the application code. Such data are utilized to analyze the happened-before relationship and resource access patterns of common operations within service systems. Based on this information, MicroRacer identifies suspicious concurrent operations and employs a three-stage validation process to test and confirm concurrency bugs. Experiments on open-source microservice benchmarks with replicated industrial bugs demonstrate Microracer’s effectiveness and efficiency in accurately detecting and pinpointing concurrency issues.
title_zh: 微调度器：用于云服务系统的并发错误检测
abstract_zh: 现代提供全球服务的云应用通常基于具有微服务架构的分布式系统构建。在这些系统中，端到端的用户请求会经过多个不同的服务和机器，表现出复杂的交互行为。因此，云服务系统容易受到并发错误的影响，这对系统的可靠性构成了重大挑战。现有的并发错误检测方法往往因侵入性较强且难以应对微服务架构的复杂性而效果有限。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了 Microracer——一种非侵入式且自动化的并发错误检测框架，专用于此类环境。Microracer 通过在运行时动态地对广泛使用的库进行插桩，收集详细的追踪数据，而无需修改应用程序代码。这些数据被用于分析服务系统中常见操作之间的“先发生”关系和资源访问模式。基于此信息，Microracer 能够识别出可疑的并发操作，并通过三阶段验证流程对并发错误进行测试与确认。在包含重复工业级缺陷的开源微服务基准测试上的实验表明，Microracer 在准确检测并精确定位并发问题方面具有高效性和有效性。

title: Conanj: Confidential Data Analysis for Confidential Computing of Java Programs
authors: Xinyuan Miao, Yuting Chen, Ziyi Lin
abstract: Confidential computing is a computing technology guaranteeing security of applications at runtime—it provides TEE (Trusted Execution Environment), which is hardware-based security isolation, for executing programs and protecting confidential data. Existing Java confidential computing techniques require engineers to annotate confidential Java methods in a Java application, followed by partitioning the application into confidential and non-confidential code running on the TEE and the REE (Rich Execution Environment) sides, respectively. Meanwhile, end-users/programmers may mistakenly annotate confidential methods, and thus confidential data may reside on the REE side, incurring vulnerabilities. We propose Conanj, a novel approach to confidential computing of Java applications. The core idea is a confidential data analysis technique, where confidential data is explicitly annotated, followed by propagation analysis and separate compilation. This enables code partitioning that ensures all accesses to, propagations of, and computations over confidential data are confined to the TEE side. We implement Conanj and evaluate it against Lejacon, a state-of-the-art technique for Java confidential computing, using a set of benchmark programs. The results show that Conanj provides a cost-effective approach to Java confidential computing: The programmer spends an affordable time/effort on annotating confidential code/data; the application code deployed on the TEE side, as part of the Trusted Computing Base (TCB), is smaller than that obtained by Lejacon, with method closures reduced by $\mathbf{1. 3 4 \%} \boldsymbol{-} \mathbf{1 9. 6 \%}$ across the benchmarks.
title_zh: Conanj：面向Java程序机密计算的机密数据分析
abstract_zh: 可信计算是一种保障应用程序运行时安全的计算技术，它通过提供基于硬件的安全隔离环境——可信执行环境（Trusted Execution Environment, TEE），来执行程序并保护机密数据。现有的Java可信计算技术要求工程师在Java应用程序中显式标注机密方法，随后将应用划分为运行在TEE（可信执行环境）侧的机密代码和运行在REE（富执行环境）侧的非机密代码。然而，终端用户或程序员可能错误地标注机密方法，导致机密数据被放置在REE侧，从而引入安全漏洞。为此，我们提出了Conanj，一种面向Java应用的新型可信计算方法。其核心思想是一种机密数据分析技术：首先对机密数据进行显式标注，继而进行传播分析与独立编译，从而实现代码划分，确保所有对机密数据的访问、传播及计算操作均被限制在TEE侧。我们实现了Conanj，并通过一组基准程序，将其与当前最先进的Java可信计算技术Lejacon进行了对比评估。结果表明，Conanj为Java可信计算提供了一种成本效益更高的方案：程序员在标注机密代码/数据时所需的时间与精力较为合理；部署在TEE侧的应用代码（作为可信计算基TCB的一部分）规模小于Lejacon方案，在各基准测试中方法闭包数量减少了$\mathbf{1.34\% - 19.6\%}$。

title: Multi-view Leaderboard: Towards Evaluating the Code Intelligence of LLMs From Multiple Views
authors: Mengyuan Liu, Zexun Zhan, Cuiyun Gao, Yujia Chen, Guoai Xu, Chun Yong Chong, Shan Gao, Xin Xia
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable performance in code intelligence tasks, prompting the development of various benchmarks and leaderboards to assess their effectiveness across diverse programming scenarios. However, existing leaderboards often rely on coarse-grained metrics and overlook performance variations across different types of tasks. In this paper, we introduce Multi-view Leaderboard, a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to assess the coding capabilities of LLMs from multiple views. Our leaderboard partitions widely-used datasets such as HumanEval, MBPP, and ComplexCodeEval into subsets based on factors like prompt length, problem complexity, and task type. It supports four popular code intelligence tasks including code generation, code completion, test case generation, and API recommendation. Additionally, our leaderboard presents results using ranking tables, line charts, radar charts, and heatmaps. Based on LLMs’ performance on different subsets, we provide model recommendations tailored to different real-world scenarios via a Sankey diagram. A user study involving 11 participants revealed that 90% valued the leaderboard’s practical usefulness for analyzing LLMs’ code intelligence from multiple perspectives. The Multi-view Leaderboard is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/MVLLL/Multi-view-leaderboard. The demonstration video is available at https://youtu.be/J-zQiOYa1Y8
title_zh: 多视角排行榜：从多个视角评估大语言模型的代码智能
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码智能任务中表现出色，推动了各类基准测试和排行榜的开发，用以评估其在多样化编程场景下的表现。然而，现有的排行榜通常依赖粗粒度的评估指标，忽视了模型在不同类型任务上的性能差异。本文提出了一种多视角排行榜（Multi-view Leaderboard），这是一个全面的评估框架，旨在从多个维度评估LLMs的编程能力。我们的排行榜将广泛使用的数据集（如HumanEval、MBPP和ComplexCodeEval）按提示长度、问题复杂度和任务类型等因素划分为多个子集。该框架支持四种主流的代码智能任务：代码生成、代码补全、测试用例生成以及API推荐。此外，我们的排行榜通过排名表、折线图、雷达图和热力图等多种可视化方式呈现结果。基于模型在不同子集上的表现，我们利用桑基图（Sankey diagram）为不同实际应用场景提供针对性的模型推荐。一项包含11名参与者的用户研究显示，90%的受访者认为该排行榜在多角度分析LLMs代码智能能力方面具有实际应用价值。多视角排行榜现已开放，访问地址为：https://huggingface.co/spaces/MVLLL/Multi-view-leaderboard。演示视频可观看：https://youtu.be/J-zQiOYa1Y8

title: Unified Modelling and Consistency Verification of UML Multi-View Models Using Alloy
authors: Yihui Guo, Shmuel Tyszberowicz, Zhiming Liu, Bo Liu
abstract: As software systems grow in complexity, Model-Driven Development demands precise and scalable verification techniques. UML enables multi-view modeling, yet its semiformal semantics frequently lead to inconsistencies across diagrams. This paper presents a consistency verification approach for class and sequence diagrams using the Alloy modeling language. We systematically transform UML models into Alloy logic through a modular abstraction strategy and a set of formal consistency rules spanning structural, behavioral, and cross-view semantics. The Alloy Analyzer then performs constraint solving, automatically detects violations, and generates counterexamples for debugging. Evaluated in a case study, the method demonstrates effective inconsistency detection, comprehensive rule coverage, and reliable validation of interaction logic. Results confirm that the approach enables automated, fine-grained consistency checking and integrates smoothly into formal verification workflows.
title_zh: 使用Alloy对UML多视图模型进行统一建模与一致性验证
abstract_zh: 随着软件系统复杂性的不断增加，模型驱动开发对精确且可扩展的验证技术提出了更高要求。UML 支持多视图建模，但其半形式化语义常常导致不同图表之间的不一致性。本文提出一种基于 Alloy 建模语言的类图与顺序图一致性验证方法。通过模块化的抽象策略以及涵盖结构、行为和跨视图语义的一组形式化一致性规则，我们将 UML 模型系统地转换为 Alloy 逻辑。随后，Alloy Analyzer 执行约束求解，自动检测不一致之处，并生成反例以辅助调试。在案例研究中的评估表明，该方法在不一致性检测方面表现有效，规则覆盖全面，且能可靠验证交互逻辑。结果证实，该方法实现了自动化、细粒度的一致性检查，并可无缝集成到形式化验证工作流中。

title: SAR Ship Target Detection Model Deployment Optimization Method for Real-Time Embedded System
authors: Bingzhi Hou, Panzi Zhao, Xiaodong Yang, Daiwei Li
publish: 2025 IEEE 25th International Conference on Communication Technology (ICCT)
abstract: This paper introduces a real-time ship detection system of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) based on resourceconstrained embedded communication platforms such as unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and space-based radar. In the overall architecture design, the general model is used as the teacher model. Lightweight modules and multi-layer deep supervised distillation training methods are designed to train and optimize the the Lightweight UNet model for SAR images(LUSNet). It is also optimized for the architecture of self-developed spacebased embedded chips to balance performance and efficiency. The experimental results show that the model based on the proposed method achieves a good balance between detection accuracy and decision speed. This method provides an effective way for realtime applications in resource-constrained environments.
title_zh: 面向实时嵌入式系统的SAR船舶目标检测模型部署优化方法
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于资源受限嵌入式通信平台（如无人机UAV和星载雷达）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）实时船舶检测系统。在整体架构设计中，采用通用模型作为教师模型，设计了轻量级模块及多层深度监督蒸馏训练方法，用于训练和优化面向SAR图像的轻量级UNet模型（LUSNet）。同时，该模型针对自主研发的星载嵌入式芯片架构进行了优化，以实现性能与效率之间的良好平衡。实验结果表明，基于所提方法的模型在检测精度与决策速度之间取得了良好的平衡，为资源受限环境下的实时应用提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: caSPESC2Vyper: Conformant and Automatic Generation from DeFi SPESC Legal Contract to Vyper Smart Contract
authors: Yue Yu, Jiahui Wang, Bo Meng, Dejun Wang
abstract: Decentralized Finance (DeFi) can provide traditional financial services through blockchain and smart contract technology. The generation of DeFi smart contracts from DeFi legal contracts has become a hot topic. However, we found that current approaches for generating DeFi smart contracts from legal contracts fail to ensure conformance between the two. To address this, we propose caSPESC2Vyper, a method to generate Vyper smart contracts from SPESC legal contracts while guaranteeing conformance. First, we define the executable formal semantics K-SPESC. Next, we establish a syntactic structure mapping from the SPESC language to the Vyper language, based on which caSPESC2Vyper is implemented. Finally, we analyze the conformance and demonstrate that caSPESC2Vyper effectively ensures conformance between DeFi legal contracts and Vyper smart contracts.
title_zh: caSPESC2Vyper：从去中心化金融SPESC法律合同到Vyper智能合约的合规性与自动生成
abstract_zh: 去中心化金融（DeFi）可通过区块链和智能合约技术提供传统金融服务。从DeFi法律合同生成DeFi智能合约已成为一个热门话题。然而，我们发现当前从法律合同生成DeFi智能合约的方法无法保证两者之间的一致性。为解决这一问题，我们提出了caSPESC2Vyper方法，该方法能够从SPESC法律合同生成Vyper智能合约，并确保两者的一致性。首先，我们定义了可执行的形式语义K-SPESC。其次，基于该语义，我们建立了SPESC语言到Vyper语言的语法结构映射，并在此基础上实现了caSPESC2Vyper。最后，我们对一致性进行了分析，结果表明caSPESC2Vyper能够有效保证DeFi法律合同与Vyper智能合约之间的一致性。

title: Anomalyspy: A Generative Defect Localization in Semiconductor Packages, with X-Ray Microscopy
authors: Riko I Made, Pawan Kumar, Pablo Quijano Velasco, Ng Chee Koon, Leong Chang Jie
abstract: Semiconductor packaging reliability is critical for advanced electronics, yet detecting rare defects like voids and misalignment remains challenging due to their subtlety and volumetric complexity. Traditional inspection methods often struggle with 3D X-ray microscopy (XRM) data, necessitating advanced computational approaches. This study introduces anomalyspy [1], a machine learning framework that leveraged Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to detect anomalies in XRM images of semiconductor packages. By reshaping the z -dimension into channels (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$z_{\text{kernel }}$</tex>) and using 3D peak detection, we achieve precise defect localization. Trained solely on a minimally defective sample, our model demonstrates robust anomaly detection, offering a scalable solution for semiconductor failure analysis.
title_zh: Anomalyspy：基于X射线显微镜的半导体封装生成式缺陷定位
abstract_zh: 半导体封装的可靠性对先进电子器件至关重要，然而由于缺陷（如空洞和错位）具有细微性及体积复杂性，检测这些罕见缺陷仍面临挑战。传统检测方法在处理三维X射线显微镜（XRM）数据时往往力不从心，因此亟需先进的计算方法。本研究提出了一种名为Anomalyspy [1] 的机器学习框架，该框架利用向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）来检测半导体封装XRM图像中的异常。通过将z维重构为通道（<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$z_{\text{kernel }}$</tex>），并结合三维峰值检测技术，实现了缺陷的精准定位。该模型仅基于少量缺陷样本进行训练，便展现出强大的异常检测能力，为半导体失效分析提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

title: OTABase: Enhancing Over-the-Air Testing to Detect Memory Crashes in Cellular Basebands
authors: CheolJun Park, Marc Egli, BeomSeok Oh, Tuan Dinh Hoang, Suhwan Jeong, Martin Crettol, Insu Yun, Mathias Payer, Yongdae Kim
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Baseband processors (BPs) in cellular devices implement complex radio protocols, and memory corruption vulnerabilities in these implementations can lead to critical security breaches, including remote code execution. Traditional approaches to detecting such vulnerabilities rely on reverse engineering or emulation. However, these methods face significant scalability challenges due to proprietary firmware and architectural complexities. Over-the-air (OTA) testing offers broader applicability but poses challenges in managing UE state, detecting crashes, and ensuring protocol coverage. We present OTABase, an OTA testing framework that enables efficient detection of memory crashes in LTE base-bands by leveraging protocol specifications. OTABase combines three key techniques: a network-side state control mechanism for efficient management of UE states and connections, a specification-guided test case generation targeting memory crashes in NAS and RRC protocols, and a two-phase crash detection oracle utilizing protocol-based liveness checks and manufacturer debug features. Evaluating OTABase on six commercial BPs from three major manufacturers, unearthed seven previously unpatched memory crashes. Among these, three were assigned CVEs, including one out-of-bounds write vulnerability that allows remote code execution. Additionally, we extend OTABase to 5G basebands for PoC, demonstrating its generalizability and practical utility.
title_zh: OTABase：提升空中下载测试以检测蜂窝基带中的内存崩溃
abstract_zh: 蜂窝设备中的基带处理器（BPs）实现了复杂的无线通信协议，而这些实现中的内存损坏漏洞可能导致严重的安全漏洞，包括远程代码执行。传统的漏洞检测方法依赖于逆向工程或模拟，但由于专有固件和架构复杂性，这些方法在可扩展性方面面临巨大挑战。空中接口（OTA）测试具有更广泛的应用潜力，但在管理用户设备（UE）状态、检测崩溃以及确保协议覆盖率方面存在困难。本文提出 OTABase，一种基于协议规范的 OTA 测试框架，能够高效检测 LTE 基带中的内存崩溃问题。OTABase 结合了三项关键技术：基于网络侧的状态控制机制，用于高效管理 UE 状态和连接；基于协议规范的测试用例生成技术，专门针对 NAS 和 RRC 协议中的内存崩溃进行检测；以及一种两阶段崩溃检测机制，结合基于协议的存活性检查与厂商提供的调试功能。在三家主流厂商的六款商用基带处理器上对 OTABase 进行评估，成功发现七个此前未被修复的内存崩溃漏洞。其中三个漏洞被分配了 CVE 编号，包括一个越界写入漏洞，可导致远程代码执行。此外，我们还将 OTABase 扩展至 5G 基带，完成了概念验证（PoC），证明了该框架的通用性和实际应用价值。

title: MAAP: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Automated Vulnerability Repair Framework for Python
authors: Junfan Chen, Zhiyuan Fu, Ting Yang, Hongyu Sun, Ruidong Li, Yuqing Zhang
abstract: Automating vulnerability repair (AVR) in Python remains constrained by low accuracy, long feedback loops, and rapidly escalating token spend when large repositories must be reasoned about. These challenges are amplified by the prevalence of multi-file, environment-dependent CVEs whose fixes span configuration, tests, and cross-module semantics. We introduce MAAP, a self-evolving, role-specialized LLM architecture for end-to-end automated patch synthesis in Python codebases. MAAP decomposes a vulnerable repository into fine-grained, dependency-aware subtasks and dispatches them via a contextual-bandit router that jointly optimizes correctness, latency, and cost. An experience-centric knowledge base surfaces successful semantic exemplars and failure signals to prune search. An agent factory dynamically spawns, retires, or coordinates agents when novel patterns or degraded rewards emerge. We evaluate MAAP on 120 real-world Python CVEs. MAAP achieves a 70.3% patch success rate, surpassing the SWE-agent baseline, which has a 56.7% success rate. This improvement incurs a 62.8% higher average token cost, but it results in a $\mathbf{1 5. 5 \%}$ lower cost per successful patch. Ablation studies show substantial drops in success when disabling the router, knowledge base, or cooperative spawning, underscoring the necessity of each component. Collectively, these results indicate that MAAP’s design can deliver robust, largely hands-free vulnerability repair for Python at practical cost envelopes and is readily extensible to other language ecosystems.
title_zh: MAAP：一种自演化多智能体自动化Python漏洞修复框架
abstract_zh: 在Python中实现漏洞修复自动化（AVR）仍受限于准确率低、反馈周期长，以及在处理大型代码库时Token消耗迅速攀升等问题。这些挑战因多文件、依赖环境的CVE（通用漏洞披露）普遍存在而进一步加剧，其修复往往涉及配置、测试以及跨模块语义的协同调整。为此，我们提出了MAAP——一种自演化、角色专业化的大语言模型（LLM）架构，用于实现Python代码库中端到端的自动化补丁生成。MAAP将存在漏洞的代码库分解为细粒度、依赖感知的子任务，并通过上下文相关的多臂老虎机路由机制，联合优化修复的正确性、响应延迟与成本。一个以经验为中心的知识库能够提取成功的语义示例和失败信号，从而有效缩小搜索空间。此外，代理工厂可根据新出现的模式或奖励下降情况，动态地创建、淘汰或协调多个代理。我们在120个真实世界的Python CVE上对MAAP进行了评估，结果显示其补丁成功率达到70.3%，显著优于SWE-agent基线（56.7%的成功率）。尽管平均Token成本高出62.8%，但每成功修复一个漏洞的单位成本却降低了15.5%。消融实验表明，若禁用路由机制、知识库或协作式代理生成机制，成功率将大幅下降，充分证明了各组件的必要性。综合来看，MAAP的设计能够以可接受的成本开销，实现对Python漏洞的稳健、基本无需人工干预的修复，并且具备良好的可扩展性，可轻松迁移到其他编程语言生态。

title: TeTRIS: General-purpose Fuzzing for Translation Bugs in Source-to-Source Code Transpilers
authors: Yeaseen Arafat, Stefan Nagy
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Amid the rise of heterogeneous computing and concerns over systems and application security, developers are increasingly embracing transpilers: a growing class of tools for converting code from one programming language into another. As languages differ greatly in constructs, syntactic sugar, security mitigations, and more, transpilers face difficulties in faithfully translating software between source and target languages—sometimes causing outright failures, or worse, subtle-yet-incorrect execution behavior. Proactively testing transpilers' correctness is thus critical to the success of code-translation-oriented development tasks, but unfortunately, no effective techniques currently exist. Although fuzz-testing appears a natural fit, current general-purpose fuzzing tools mostly generate invalid, junk code that fails to engage transpilers' core translation logic; while dedicated compiler fuzzers cannot keep pace with the ever-expanding set of languages targeted by existing and emergent transpilers. Thoroughly vetting transpilers' correctness thus demands a fuzzing approach combining the reach of general-purpose fuzzing—with the precision of dedicated compiler fuzzers. This paper presents TeTRIS: a general-purpose fuzzer for testing source-to-source code transpilers. At its core, TeTRIS bridges the flexibility of general-purpose fuzzing, abstracting away language-level differences into a unified interface for fine-grained code mutations, with the precision of compiler fuzzers by rigorously enforcing syntactic and semantic correctness. Relying solely on minimal language specifications, TeTRIS supports fuzzing of any transpiler—irrespective of input or output language—producing high-quality programs that extensively probe its underlying translation logic. In an evaluation against four state-of-the-art fuzzers across seven popular transpilers for C, Go, and Haxe, TeTRIS is the only solution to uphold both high language validity and high transpiler code coverage—whilst supporting the broadest range of transpilers. Moreover, TeTRIS reveals the most code translation bugs—all 12 of which were previously unknown—underscoring its effectiveness in vetting today's diverse transpiler ecosystem.
title_zh: TeTRIS：面向源到源代码转换器中翻译错误的通用模糊测试
abstract_zh:
随着异构计算的兴起以及对系统和应用安全性的日益关注，开发者正越来越多地采用转译器（transpilers）：一类用于将代码从一种编程语言转换为另一种语言的工具。由于不同语言在语法结构、语法糖、安全防护机制等方面存在巨大差异，转译器在忠实翻译源代码与目标代码之间面临诸多挑战——有时导致直接失败，甚至更糟的是产生细微但错误的执行行为。因此，主动测试转译器的正确性对于以代码转换为核心的开发任务的成功至关重要，然而目前尚无有效的技术手段。尽管模糊测试（fuzz-testing）看似是理想选择，但现有的通用模糊测试工具大多生成无效或无意义的代码，无法有效触发转译器的核心转换逻辑；而专门针对编译器的模糊测试工具又难以跟上现有及新兴转译器所支持的语言种类的持续扩展。因此，全面验证转译器的正确性，亟需一种兼具通用模糊测试广度与专用编译器模糊测试精度的新型方法。

本文提出 TeTRIS：一种用于测试源到源代码转译器的通用模糊测试工具。TeTRIS 的核心思想在于，将通用模糊测试的灵活性与专用编译器模糊测试的精确性相结合：一方面，它通过统一接口抽象语言层面的差异，实现细粒度的代码变异；另一方面，它严格保证生成代码在语法和语义上的正确性。TeTRIS 仅依赖最小化的语言规范，即可支持对任意转译器的模糊测试——无论其输入或输出语言为何，均能生成高质量的程序，充分探测其底层转换逻辑。

在对 C、Go 和 Haxe 语言的七款主流转译器进行评估时，TeTRIS 与四种最先进的模糊测试工具进行对比，结果表明：TeTRIS 是唯一同时实现高语言有效性与高转译器代码覆盖率的方案，且支持的转译器范围最广。更重要的是，TeTRIS 发现了全部 12 个此前未知的代码转换缺陷，充分证明了其在全面评估当今多样化转译器生态方面的卓越效能。

title: Resilient Edge-IoT Architectures by Optimizing Energy, Security and Adaptability : A Review
authors: Shri Janani Muruganantham, N. Ramasubramanian, B. Shameedha Begum
publish: 2025 IEEE 9th International Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT)
abstract: The proliferation of Internet of Things (IoT) networks has accelerated the transition of computation from cloud infrastructures to edge devices, enabling latency-sensitive intelligence in domains such as healthcare, precision agriculture, disaster response, and smart cities. Yet, constrained computational and energy budgets introduce a tri-fold challenge: achieving energy efficiency, embedding hardware-level security, and sustaining adaptability across heterogeneous applications. Prior efforts address these dimensions in isolation custom ASICs, FPGA accelerators, and neuromorphic processors reduce memory and computation overhead; security-oriented designs integrate trusted execution environments, cryptographic co-processors, and side-channel–resilient logic; while domain-specific architectures leverage near-memory computing, dynamic voltage scaling, and lightweight sensor fusion for mission-critical reliability. However, a unified framework that co-optimizes these layers remains missing. This review consolidates advancements across the three directions, critiques their limitations, and outlines future opportunities for hardware-software co-designs with federated learning support, adaptive workload scheduling, and joint energy–security optimization to realize next-generation edge intelligence.
title_zh: 通过优化能源、安全性和适应性构建弹性边缘物联网架构：综述
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）网络的迅速普及，推动了计算从云端基础设施向边缘设备的转型，使医疗健康、精准农业、灾害响应和智慧城市等领域的低延迟智能应用成为可能。然而，受限的计算能力和能源预算带来了三重挑战：实现能效优化、嵌入硬件级安全机制，以及在异构应用间保持适应性。以往的研究往往孤立地解决这些方面：专用集成电路（ASIC）、现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）加速器和类脑计算处理器通过减少内存与计算开销来提升效率；面向安全的设计则集成可信执行环境、密码协处理器和抗侧信道攻击逻辑；而领域专用架构则利用近内存计算、动态电压调节和轻量级传感器融合技术，保障关键任务的可靠性。然而，目前仍缺乏一个能够协同优化这些层次的统一框架。本文综述了上述三个方向的最新进展，批判性分析了现有技术的局限性，并展望了未来硬件-软件协同设计的发展机遇，包括支持联邦学习、自适应工作负载调度以及能效与安全的联合优化，以实现下一代边缘智能。

title: Analysis of Error Root Cause Identification Algorithms
authors: Akash Gaurav, Muralidhara VN
publish: 2025 International Conference on Data Science and Intelligent Systems (DSIS)
abstract: Root Cause Analysis (RCA) is essential for improving manufacturing systems, particularly under Industry 4.0 standards that emphasize precision, efficiency, and reliability. Errors in manufacturing processes-caused by equipment failures, process variations, or human factors-lead to defects, increased costs, and yield loss. This issue is especially significant in semiconductor manufacturing, where wafer fabrication requires high levels of accuracy and consistency. Recent approaches in intelligent manufacturing employ data mining to automatically detect patterns and causal relationships that impact yield. This paper introduces five advanced sequence analysis algorithms as data-driven methods for identifying tool-related patterns in wafer fabrication data. The extracted patterns enable the localization of critical root cause nodes that drive yield degradation. A comparative evaluation of these algorithms is conducted to assess their effectiveness and efficiency in root cause detection. The results demonstrate the potential of sequence analysis techniques to enhance RCA and improve overall manufacturing performance.
title_zh: 错误根因识别算法的分析
abstract_zh: 根本原因分析（RCA）对于提升制造系统至关重要，尤其是在强调精度、效率和可靠性的工业4.0标准背景下。制造过程中出现的错误——由设备故障、工艺波动或人为因素引起——会导致缺陷增加、成本上升以及良率损失。这一问题在半导体制造中尤为突出，因为晶圆制造需要极高的准确性和一致性。近年来，智能制造领域采用数据挖掘技术，自动识别影响良率的模式与因果关系。本文提出五种先进的序列分析算法，作为数据驱动方法，用于识别晶圆制造数据中的设备相关模式。所提取的模式有助于定位导致良率下降的关键根本原因节点。本文对这些算法进行了对比评估，以检验其在根本原因检测中的有效性和效率。结果表明，序列分析技术具有显著潜力，可提升根本原因分析能力，从而全面改善制造性能。

title: FireAI: A Framework for Dynamic Firewall Policy Generation using Generative Artificial Intelligence
authors: Amine Rahmani, Sem Sahki, Imene Nadji, Amine Abbas
publish: 2025 Fourth International Conference on Theoretical and Applicative Aspects of Computer Science (ICTAACS)
abstract: Traditional network firewalls rely on static, manually configured rule sets that are ill-suited for the dynamic nature of modern networks and the rapid evolution of cyber threats. This manual approach is not only resource-intensive but also prone to human error, often resulting in security gaps or network disruptions. In this paper, we introduce FireAI, a novel framework that leverages Generative Artificial Intelligence to automate the entire lifecycle of firewall policy management. FireAI continuously monitors the network state, analyses real-time traffic data, and intelligently generates context-aware firewall rules. The system utilizes a Large Language Model (LLM), guided by carefully engineered prompts, to translate network metrics into syntactically valid and secure policies for a target firewall. We present a proof-of-concept implementation within a simulated network environment using pfSense firewall, demonstrating its capability to dynamically adapt security postures in response to network changes. Our results show that FireAI can successfully generate and deploy effective firewall rules, establishing a paradigm for a more adaptive, autonomous, and resilient network security infrastructure.
title_zh: FireAI：一种基于生成式人工智能的动态防火墙策略生成框架
abstract_zh: 传统网络防火墙依赖于静态的手动配置规则集，这种模式难以适应现代网络的动态特性以及网络威胁的快速演变。这种人工管理方式不仅资源消耗大，而且容易因人为失误导致安全漏洞或网络中断。本文提出了一种名为FireAI的新框架，该框架利用生成式人工智能技术，实现防火墙策略管理全生命周期的自动化。FireAI持续监控网络状态，分析实时流量数据，并智能生成上下文感知的防火墙规则。系统采用大型语言模型（LLM），通过精心设计的提示词（prompts）引导，将网络指标转化为语法正确且安全的目标防火墙策略。我们在基于pfSense防火墙的模拟网络环境中实现了概念验证，展示了系统能够根据网络变化动态调整安全策略的能力。实验结果表明，FireAI能够成功生成并部署有效的防火墙规则，为构建更加自适应、自主化和韧性的网络安全部署模式提供了新范例。

title: Sniffing Out Code Smells with Precision: Evaluating Two Data Balancing Strategies for Severity Classification
authors: Vishesh Kumar Singh, Shweta
publish: 2025 IEEE 9th International Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT)
abstract: Code smells are defects in software design that reduce software quality and maintainability. Furthermore, it is challenging to detect them using machine learning techniques due to the small and biased datasets. We compare two data augmentation strategies for creating balanced datasets that target four code smells: Blob, Long Method, Data Class, and Feature Envy. To add more data points of lexical and syntactic variations, the first strategy uses noise injection and synonym replacement; the second strategy uses code refactoring to create data points that are both structurally and semantically different.By finetuninga BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers) based model for severity classification and detection accuracy, we investigate both strategies. The outcomes show the benefits and drawbacks of each strategy for resolving class imbalance problem. This comparison of the two data augmentation techniques shows how they can be used practically to create reliable datasets.
title_zh: 精准识别代码异味：评估两种数据平衡策略在严重性分类中的应用
abstract_zh: 代码异味是影响软件设计质量与可维护性的缺陷。由于数据集规模小且存在偏差，使用机器学习技术检测这些异味颇具挑战性。本文对比了两种数据增强策略，旨在构建平衡数据集，以应对四种代码异味：大类（Blob）、过长方法（Long Method）、数据类（Data Class）和特征依恋（Feature Envy）。第一种策略通过注入噪声和同义词替换，增加词汇和语法上的变异数据点；第二种策略则通过代码重构，生成在结构和语义上均不同的数据点。我们对基于BERT（双向编码器表示变换）的模型进行微调，用于评估其在严重性分类和检测准确率方面的表现。实验结果揭示了两种策略在解决类别不平衡问题上的优缺点。该对比研究展示了两种数据增强技术在实际中构建可靠数据集的应用潜力。

title: A Comparative Study Towards Designing a Hybrid Architecture of Microservices and LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
authors: Peyman Yazdanian, Yan Liu, Zheng Li
abstract: LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (LLM-MAS) present an emerging paradigm for constructing intelligent and adaptive applications that enable autonomous reasoning and collaborative problem-solving. Empirical studies show that current LLM-MAS still suffers from overlapping agent roles, unclear capabilities, and goal misalignment. In contrast, Microservice Systems (MS) are designed with modularity, and each service encapsulates a well-defined context and interface with structured and deterministic execution. From the system architecture principles, these paradigms demonstrate parallel attributes and complementary strengths that lead to a synthesized hybrid architecture. In this paper, we analyze the design factors of hybrid MS and LLM-MAS, as well as the main challenges, through a comparative study across eight architectural dimensions, including function encapsulation, orchestration, API design, auto-correction, data communication, operations, quality attributes, and environment awareness. The analysis reveals critical mismatches, design synergies, and transferable best practices. To motivate future work, we define four research questions to categorize the challenges. The goal is to create a converging design space for exploring architecture design towards intelligent, autonomous, modular, and adaptive systems.
title_zh: 面向设计微服务与基于大语言模型的多智能体系统混合架构的比较研究
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的多智能体系统（LLM-MAS）为构建具备自主推理与协作求解能力的智能自适应应用提供了一种新兴范式。实证研究表明，当前的LLM-MAS仍面临智能体角色重叠、能力边界模糊以及目标错位等问题。相比之下，微服务系统（MS）以模块化设计为核心，每个服务均封装了明确的上下文，并通过结构化、确定性的接口进行交互，具备良好的可维护性与可扩展性。从系统架构原则来看，这两种范式在特性上具有并行性，且在优势上互为补充，因而催生出一种融合的混合架构。本文通过在八个架构维度——功能封装、编排、API设计、自动纠错、数据通信、运维管理、质量属性以及环境感知——上的对比分析，深入探讨了混合型微服务与LLM-MAS的设计要素及主要挑战。研究揭示了关键的不匹配点、设计协同效应以及可迁移的最佳实践。为推动未来研究，本文进一步提出四个研究问题，以系统化分类当前面临的挑战。最终目标是构建一个汇聚性的设计空间，助力探索面向智能化、自主化、模块化与自适应系统的架构设计新路径。

title: Generating Linear Ranking Functions for Program Termination Using Transformers
authors: Yuxing Cai, Changbo Chen, Yi Li
publish: 2025 International Conference on Data Science and Intelligent Systems (DSIS)
abstract: Synthesizing ranking functions for loop programs is an important technique for proving termination. Unlike previous deep learning approaches that depend on program execution to obtain training data and synthesize ranking functions, we propose the first Transformer-based framework capable of directly synthesizing ranking functions, supporting both classification and generation tasks. The classification task determines if a linear simple loop has a non-trivial linear ranking function. If it has, the generation task generates the coefficients of such a function. We address the data scarcity problem by introducing a method to increase the number of samples with non-trivial linear ranking functions, enabling an effective generation of a large-scale dataset of linear simple loops. To improve classification performance, we employ a Mixture of Expert Encoders architecture that exploits both deep and shallow features. For the cases of one and two variables, classification models achieve accuracies ranging from 76.9% to 99.2%, while the accuracies of the generation models range from 68.5% to 100%. The proposed classification models outperform the baseline models on most of the datasets. The generation models, processing batches of 128 programs in parallel, demonstrate faster inference than the Z3 solver.
title_zh: 使用Transformer生成线性排名函数以实现程序终止性分析
abstract_zh: 为循环程序合成排序函数是证明程序终止性的重要技术。与以往依赖程序执行获取训练数据并合成排序函数的深度学习方法不同，本文提出了首个基于Transformer的框架，能够直接合成排序函数，并同时支持分类与生成任务。分类任务用于判断一个线性简单循环是否存在非平凡的线性排序函数；若存在，则由生成任务进一步生成该函数的系数。为解决数据稀缺问题，我们提出一种方法，有效增加具有非平凡线性排序函数的样本数量，从而构建大规模的线性简单循环数据集。为提升分类性能，我们采用专家混合编码器（Mixture of Expert Encoders）架构，充分挖掘深层与浅层特征。对于一变量和二变量的情形，分类模型的准确率在76.9%至99.2%之间，而生成模型的准确率则在68.5%至100%之间。所提出的分类模型在大多数数据集上均优于基线模型。生成模型在并行处理每批128个程序时，推理速度优于Z3求解器。

title: Selection of a Subset of Effective Project Solutions Under Conditions of Interval Uncertainty
authors: Volodymyr Bezkorovainyi, Volodymyr Kobziev, Artem Khovrat, Yaroslav Luchenko
publish: 2025 IEEE 8th International Conference on Methods and Systems of Navigation and Motion Control (MSNMC)
abstract: A new method for forming subsets of effective solutions under conditions of interval uncertainty of local criteria values was developed. The proposed approach addresses multi-criteria optimization challenges in design automation where project characteristics are determined through mathematical modeling with inherent errors. The method employs generalized Hukuhara difference estimates and associated comparison indices to evaluate project solutions when interval intersection occurs, utilizing situation analysis based on risk and reward assessment. The approach involves preliminary ranking based on averaged utility function values of local criteria, followed by pairwise comparisons using interval arithmetic. An additive utility model prevents substantial expansion of output data intervals. Experimental validation using UAV design optimization demonstrates effectiveness. Comparison indices based on generalized Hukuhara difference correspond to initial ordering via interval centers. The practical application increases efficiency of automated design technologies by formalizing procedures for selecting Pareto-optimal options for decision-maker evaluation in combinatorial multi-criteria problems.
title_zh: 区间不确定性条件下有效项目解决方案的子集选择
abstract_zh: 在局部准则值存在区间不确定性条件下，提出了一种生成有效解子集的新方法。该方法针对设计自动化中的多准则优化问题，其中项目特征通过存在固有误差的数学建模确定。该方法采用广义Hukuhara差分估计及其相关比较指标，在区间相交情况下评估项目方案，基于风险与收益评估进行情境分析。该方法首先根据局部准则的平均效用函数值进行初步排序，随后利用区间算术进行两两比较。采用加性效用模型可有效避免输出数据区间过度扩展。通过无人机设计优化的实验验证，证明了该方法的有效性。基于广义Hukuhara差分的比较指标与基于区间中心的初始排序相对应。该方法的实际应用通过形式化组合多准则问题中帕累托最优方案的选择流程，显著提升了自动化设计技术的效率，为决策者评估提供了支持。

title: Towards Function-Level Correctness Assessment of System Software with LLMs: A Case Study
authors: Ming Zhong, Xin Sun
abstract: System software is highly complex and requires significant manual development effort. With the wide application of large language models (LLMs) in software engineering, LLMs are increasingly used to automatically generate system software at the function level. However, due to their limited accuracy, the generated functions often contain errors, which prevent them from being compiled and executed for regression testing. As a result, developers must manually debug these functions, which is time-consuming and heavily dependent on expertise. In this paper, we first emphasize the emerging need for assessing function correctness without relying on regression tests in the context of LLM-generated system software. Next, we propose a preliminary data-driven approach, TeleSys, which generates a substantial amount of function variants (covering correct and erroneous functions) to fine-tune LLMs for correctness assessment. Preliminary results show that an LLM (QWen2.5-Coder-1.5B) fine-tuned with TeleSys-generated data outperforms two prompt-based baselines (ICE-Score and SWE-Judge, combined with QWen2.5-Coder-32B and GPT-4o-mini), demonstrating the effectiveness of our data-driven approach in improving the accuracy of correctness assessment for LLM-generated system software. Finally, we propose two future directions to enable more effective deployment of LLMs for system software correctness assessment in practical scenarios.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的系统软件功能级正确性评估：一项案例研究
abstract_zh: 系统软件极为复杂，需要大量的人工开发工作。随着大语言模型（LLMs）在软件工程中的广泛应用，LLMs 正越来越多地被用于在函数级别自动生成系统软件。然而，由于其准确率有限，生成的函数常常包含错误，导致无法通过编译或执行，从而无法进行回归测试。因此，开发者必须手动调试这些函数，这一过程耗时且高度依赖专业经验。本文首先强调了在 LLM 生成系统软件的背景下，无需依赖回归测试即可评估函数正确性的新兴需求。随后，我们提出了一种初步的数据驱动方法——TeleSys，该方法生成大量函数变体（涵盖正确与错误的函数），用于微调 LLM 以实现更准确的正确性评估。初步实验结果表明，使用 TeleSys 生成的数据对 LLM（QWen2.5-Coder-1.5B）进行微调后，其性能优于两种基于提示的基线方法（ICE-Score 和 SWE-Judge，分别结合 QWen2.5-Coder-32B 与 GPT-4o-mini），证明了我们数据驱动方法在提升 LLM 生成系统软件正确性评估准确性方面的有效性。最后，我们提出了两个未来研究方向，旨在推动 LLM 在实际场景中更高效地应用于系统软件正确性评估。

title: Towards Engineering Multi-Agent LLMs: A Protocol-Driven Approach
authors: Zhenyu Mao, Jacky Keung, Fengji Zhang, Shuo Liu, Yifei Wang, Jialong Li
abstract: The increasing demand for software development has driven interest in automating software engineering (SE) tasks using Large Language Models (LLMs). Recent efforts extend LLMs into multi-agent systems (MAS) that emulate collaborative development workflows, but these systems often fail due to three core deficiencies: under-specification, coordination misalignment, and inappropriate verification, arising from the absence of foundational SE structuring principles. This paper introduces Software Engineering Multi-Agent Protocol (SEMAP), a protocol-layer methodology that instantiates three core SE design principles for multi-agent LLMs: (1) explicit behavioral contract modeling, (2) structured messaging, and (3) lifecycleguided execution with verification, and is implemented atop Google’s Agent-to-Agent (A2A) infrastructure. Empirical evaluation using the Multi-Agent System Failure Taxonomy (MAST) framework demonstrates that SEMAP effectively reduces failures across different SE tasks. In code development, it achieves up to a $69.6 \%$ reduction in total failures for function-level development and $\mathbf{5 6 . 7 \%}$ for deployment-level development. For vulnerability detection, SEMAP reduces failure counts by up to $47.4 \%$ on Python tasks and $28.2 \%$ on $\mathrm{C} / \mathrm{C}++$ tasks.
title_zh: 面向多智能体大模型的工程化：一种协议驱动的方法
abstract_zh: 软件开发需求的不断增长推动了利用大型语言模型（LLMs）自动化软件工程（SE）任务的兴趣。近期的研究将LLMs扩展至多智能体系统（MAS），以模拟协作式开发流程，但这些系统常常因三个核心缺陷而失败：规范不足、协调错位以及验证不当，其根源在于缺乏基础的软件工程结构化原则。本文提出了一种软件工程多智能体协议（SEMAP），这是一种协议层方法，旨在为多智能体LLM实现三个核心的软件工程设计原则：（1）显式的行为契约建模，（2）结构化消息传递，以及（3）基于生命周期的执行与验证，并基于谷歌的智能体间（A2A）基础设施实现。通过多智能体系统失败分类框架（MAST）进行的实证评估表明，SEMAP能有效降低各类软件工程任务中的失败率。在代码开发任务中，其在函数级开发上最多可减少69.6%的总失败率，在部署级开发上可减少56.7%。在漏洞检测任务中，SEMAP在Python任务上最多减少47.4%的失败次数，在C/C++任务上减少28.2%。

title: GATUNER:Genetic Algorithm Applied to Floating-Point Precision Tuning
authors: Jianing Zhang, Jinchen Xu, Hongru Yang, Tao Zhang, Shuai Wang, Bei Zhou
abstract: Floating-point arithmetic is widely used in high-precision computing fields such as national defense, aerospace, and finance. Different applications have varying requirements for floating-point computation precision, and how to maximize program performance while meeting precision requirements is a crucial challenge in high-performance program design. Mixed-precision technology is a common optimization strategy to address this issue, which involves using multiple precision types within the same program. However, most existing research on mixed precision tends to fall into local optima and fails to directly provide users with usable mixed-precision programs. Since genetic algorithms are optimization methods with global search capabilities, we propose a genetic algorithm-based mixed-precision tuning method and develop a tool called GATUNER. Specifically, GATUNER first analyzes the variables and statements of the program to construct a dependency graph of the program. Then, it uses the Leiden algorithm to detect community structures in the dependency graph, employs an improved genetic algorithm to search for mixed-precision configurations, and finally automatically generates the corresponding mixed-precision program. We evaluated GATUNER on 14 benchmark tests and application programs. The experimental results show that GATUNER can find valid mixed-precision configurations for 76.79% of the test programs, with an average performance improvement of 31.65% for the found mixed-precision configurations. Compared with HIFPTUNER, ADAPT, and CHEF-FP, the average performance improvement of the mixed-precision configurations found by GATUNER increased by 14.1%, 24.09%, and 15.18% respectively. In addition, compared with PESA, the average performance improvement of the mixed-precision configurations obtained by GATUNER increased by 18.67%.
title_zh: GATUNER：用于浮点精度调优的遗传算法
abstract_zh: 浮点运算在国防、航空航天、金融等高精度计算领域被广泛应用。不同应用对浮点计算精度的要求各不相同，如何在满足精度需求的前提下最大化程序性能，是高性能程序设计中的关键挑战。混合精度技术是一种常见的优化策略，通过在同一程序中使用多种精度类型来应对这一问题。然而，现有的大多数混合精度研究容易陷入局部最优，且无法直接为用户提供可用的混合精度程序。由于遗传算法具有全局搜索能力，我们提出了一种基于遗传算法的混合精度调优方法，并开发了一个名为 GATUNER 的工具。具体而言，GATUNER 首先分析程序中的变量和语句，构建程序的依赖图；随后利用 Leiden 算法检测依赖图中的社区结构，采用改进的遗传算法搜索混合精度配置，并最终自动生成相应的混合精度程序。我们在 14 个基准测试程序和实际应用程序上对 GATUNER 进行了评估。实验结果表明，GATUNER 能够为 76.79% 的测试程序找到有效的混合精度配置，所找到配置的平均性能提升达到 31.65%。与 HIFPTUNER、ADAPT 和 CHEF-FP 相比，GATUNER 所发现的混合精度配置的平均性能提升分别提高了 14.1%、24.09% 和 15.18%。此外，与 PESA 相比，GATUNER 所获得的混合精度配置的平均性能提升提高了 18.67%。

title: CodeBuddy – An AI-Powered Code Learning Buddy
authors: Jayashree Pasalkar, Tushar Gajbhiye, Omkar Ovhal, Sahil Hanwate
publish: 2025 IEEE 9th International Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT)
abstract: Data structures, algorithms, and problem-solving have become crucial skills that a computer science student must master. However, debugging and logical reasoning remain the hardest issues for many learners. Previous online platforms suffer from extensive solutions or generic advice, which cannot offer much opportunity for independent learning. This paper introduces CodeBuddy, an AI-assisted coding support system designed to give structured hints, debugging assistance, and conceptual explanations without providing final answers to the learners. The system is built upon the Gemini API for intelligent guidance, a Node.js-Express.js backend for system management, a React.js frontend integrated with Monaco Editor for coding interaction, and MongoDB for progress tracking. This contains gamification features such as leaderboards and activity streaks, too, aimed at improving learner engagement. The system fine-tunes the generation of the hint with regard to the performance of the user. Experimental evaluation has proved that AI-based mentoring improves problem-solving efficiency, reduces over-reliance on predefined solutions, and prepares students better for coding interviews and competitive programming.
title_zh: CodeBuddy – 一款由人工智能驱动的代码学习伙伴
abstract_zh: 数据结构、算法和问题解决能力已成为计算机科学学生必须掌握的核心技能。然而，对于许多学习者而言，调试技巧和逻辑推理仍是最大的挑战。以往的在线学习平台往往提供过于详尽的解决方案或泛泛而谈的建议，难以促进学习者的独立思考。本文介绍了一种名为 CodeBuddy 的人工智能辅助编程支持系统，该系统旨在为学习者提供结构化的提示、调试帮助和概念性解释，而不会直接给出最终答案。系统基于 Gemini API 实现智能引导，采用 Node.js 与 Express.js 构建后端以管理整体运行，前端基于 React.js 并集成 Monaco 编辑器以实现交互式编程体验，同时使用 MongoDB 实现学习进度追踪。此外，系统还引入了游戏化功能，如排行榜和连续活跃天数奖励，以提升学习者的参与度。系统能够根据用户的表现动态调整提示生成策略，实现个性化指导。实验评估表明，基于人工智能的辅导显著提升了问题解决效率，减少了对预设解法的依赖，并有效帮助学生为编程面试和竞赛编程做好更充分的准备。

title: Adaptive AI Agent Placement and Migration in Edge Intelligence Systems
authors: Xingdan Wang, Jiayi He, Zhiqing Tang, Jianxiong Guo, Jiong Lou, Liping Qian, Tian Wang, Weijia Jia
publish: 2025 IEEE 25th International Conference on Communication Technology (ICCT)
abstract: The rise of LLMs such as ChatGPT and Claude fuels the need for AI agents capable of real-time task handling. However, migrating data-intensive, multi-modal edge workloads to cloud data centers, traditionally used for agent deployment, introduces significant latency. Deploying AI agents at the edge improves efficiency and reduces latency. However, edge environments present challenges due to limited and heterogeneous resources. Maintaining QoS for mobile users necessitates agent migration, which is complicated by the complexity of AI agents coordinating LLMs, task planning, memory, and external tools. This paper presents the first systematic deployment and management solution for LLM-based AI agents in dynamic edge environments. We propose a novel adaptive framework for AI agent placement and migration in edge intelligence systems. Our approach models resource constraints and latency/cost, leveraging ant colony algorithms and LLM-based optimization for efficient decision-making. It autonomously places agents to optimize resource utilization and QoS and enables lightweight agent migration by transferring only essential state. Implemented on a distributed system using AgentScope and validated across globally distributed edge servers, our solution significantly reduces deployment latency and migration costs.
title_zh: 边缘智能系统中的自适应AI代理部署与迁移
abstract_zh: 以ChatGPT和Claude为代表的大型语言模型（LLM）的兴起，推动了对具备实时任务处理能力的AI智能体的需求。然而，将数据密集型、多模态的边缘工作负载迁移至传统用于智能体部署的云数据中心，会引入显著的延迟。将AI智能体部署在边缘侧，能够提升效率并降低延迟。然而，边缘环境受限于资源稀缺且异构，带来了诸多挑战。为保障移动用户的服务质量（QoS），需要实现智能体的动态迁移，但AI智能体本身结构复杂，涉及LLM协同、任务规划、记忆管理以及外部工具调用，使得迁移过程尤为困难。本文提出了首个针对动态边缘环境的基于LLM的AI智能体系统性部署与管理解决方案。我们设计了一种新颖的自适应框架，用于边缘智能系统中AI智能体的部署与迁移。该方法通过建模资源约束、延迟与成本，结合蚁群算法与基于LLM的优化策略，实现高效决策。系统能够自主完成智能体的部署，以优化资源利用率与QoS，并通过仅传输关键状态信息，实现轻量级智能体迁移。该方案基于分布式系统实现，采用AgentScope框架，并在跨全球分布的边缘服务器上进行了验证，显著降低了部署延迟与迁移成本。

title: Chain of Command: Context-Aware Android Malware Detection via Permission-to-API Call Chains and Graph Representation Learning
authors: Zhichao Shi, Qiang Han, Zihao Zhang
abstract: Android malware detection has become increasingly critical as mobile applications continue to proliferate. Traditional detection methods primarily rely on static analysis of permissions and API calls, but often fail to capture the complex behavioral patterns and contextual relationships inherent in malicious applications. To address this limitation, we introduce Chain of Command, a novel framework centered on the Permission-to-API Call Chain (PACC). A PACC represents a complete execution path from an application entry point to a sensitive API invocation, effectively preserving the contextual link between a required permission and its use. Our methodology comprises three stages: first, extracting PACCs through a backward analysis of the application’s call graph; second, performing semantic abstraction to map concrete method signatures to generalized behavioral categories; and third, constructing a compact behavior graph from these abstracted chains, which is then classified using a Graph Attention Network (GAT). Evaluation on a large-scale Android dataset demonstrates that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and robustness. Our findings underscore the efficacy of integrating contextual feature engineering, semantic abstraction, and graph representation learning for developing more reliable and interpretable malware detection systems.
title_zh: 命令链：基于权限到API调用链和图表示学习的上下文感知Android恶意软件检测
abstract_zh: 随着移动应用的持续增长，Android恶意软件检测变得日益重要。传统检测方法主要依赖于权限和API调用的静态分析，但往往无法捕捉恶意应用中复杂的运行时行为模式及其上下文关系。为解决这一局限性，我们提出了一种名为“命令链”（Chain of Command）的新框架，其核心是权限到API调用链（Permission-to-API Call Chain, PACC）。PACC代表了从应用入口点到敏感API调用的完整执行路径，有效保留了所需权限与其实际使用之间的上下文关联。我们的方法包含三个阶段：首先，通过反向分析应用的调用图提取PACC；其次，进行语义抽象，将具体的方法签名映射到通用的行为类别；最后，基于抽象后的链构建紧凑的行为图，并利用图注意力网络（Graph Attention Network, GAT）进行分类。在大规模Android数据集上的评估表明，该框架在准确率和鲁棒性方面均显著优于现有最先进方法。研究结果表明，将上下文特征工程、语义抽象与图表示学习相结合，能够有效提升恶意软件检测系统的可靠性与可解释性。

title: RAG4Test: Retrieving GUI States for Multilingual Bug Report and Test Case Generation via LLMs
authors: Zhiyao Wang, Xiujing Guo, Tatsuhiro Tsuchiya
abstract: The scalability and efficiency of software testing are persistently hindered by a reliance on manual practices for creating test cases and bug reports. Moreover, the valuable insights from post-release user feedback are often lost due to the lack of an automated pipeline connecting them to regression testing. To overcome these challenges, we present a novel framework that synergizes the structural representation of software with the generative power of Large Language Models (LLMs). We first represent the application’s Graphical User Interface (GUI) as a directed graph, capturing its components and navigational logic. This queryable graph provides essential, structured context for a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) model, which then autonomously generates and populates high-quality test cases and bug reports. A key innovation of our work is a fully automated pipeline that processes unstructured user feedback and error reports, transforming them into standardized test cases. We selected some reviews from a popular mobile App for preliminary experiments and verified the feasibility and efficiency improvement of this method.
title_zh: RAG4Test：通过大语言模型实现多语言错误报告与测试用例生成的GUI状态检索
abstract_zh: 软件测试的可扩展性和效率长期以来受到对人工创建测试用例和缺陷报告的依赖的制约。此外，发布后用户反馈中的宝贵见解常常因缺乏将这些反馈与回归测试相连接的自动化流程而丢失。为克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种创新框架，该框架将软件的结构化表示与大型语言模型（LLMs）的生成能力相结合。我们首先将应用程序的图形用户界面（GUI）表示为有向图，以捕捉其组件及导航逻辑。这一可查询的图结构为检索增强生成（RAG）模型提供了关键的结构化上下文，使其能够自主生成并填充高质量的测试用例和缺陷报告。我们工作的关键创新在于构建了一个完全自动化的流程，能够处理非结构化的用户反馈和错误报告，并将其转化为标准化的测试用例。我们选取了一款流行移动应用的部分用户评论进行初步实验，验证了该方法的可行性及其在效率上的提升。

title: Understanding the Security Impact of CHERI on the Operating System Kernel
authors: Zhaofeng Li, Jerry Zhang, Joshua Tlatelpa-Agustin, Xiangdong Chen, Anton Burtsev
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Capability Hardware Enhanced RISC Instructions (CHERI) is a set of hardware extensions that allow enforcement of spatial and temporal safety for unsafe programming languages like C. CHERI utilizes the concept of hardware capabilities to enforce bounds checks on all memory accesses and a hardware-assisted revocation scheme to enforce temporal safety. In theory, CHERI offers a surprising mix of practicality and strong security guarantees for traditionally unsafe environments like operating system kernels: capability extensions block a range of safety-related vulnerabilities common to low-level systems code while requiring only modest engineering effort. Our work takes a deep look at the potential impact of CHERI on the security of a commodity operating system kernel. We analyze a total of 439 kernel vulnerabilities in Linux and FreeBSD kernels. Our analysis shows that CHERI can block 61 % of kernel vulnerabilities if temporal safety is implemented in the kernel (35% if capability revocation is off). Enabling CHERI requires a modest effort, e.g., porting the FreeBSD kernel to support pure-capability mode of execution took 7 months. Finally, compared to Rust, which is able to mitigate 84% of kernel exploits, CHERI achieves the rate of 70% (38% if revocation is off). While CHERI is less effective, enabling it in the kernel requires a much lower development effort.
title_zh: 理解CHERI对操作系统内核安全的影响
abstract_zh: 能力硬件增强型RISC指令（CHERI）是一组硬件扩展，能够为C等不安全编程语言强制实施空间安全和时间安全。CHERI利用硬件能力（capabilities）的概念，对所有内存访问强制执行边界检查，并通过硬件辅助的撤销机制来实现时间安全。理论上，CHERI为传统上不安全的环境（如操作系统内核）提供了实用性和强安全保证的意外结合：能力扩展可以阻止大量低级系统代码中常见的安全相关漏洞，且仅需适度的工程投入。我们的工作深入探讨了CHERI对商用操作系统内核安全性的潜在影响。我们分析了Linux和FreeBSD内核中共439个内核漏洞。分析表明，如果在内核中实现时间安全，CHERI可阻止61%的内核漏洞（若关闭能力撤销功能，则为35%）。启用CHERI所需的工作量适中，例如，将FreeBSD内核移植到纯能力执行模式仅耗时7个月。最后，与能够缓解84%内核攻击的Rust相比，CHERI可实现70%的漏洞阻断率（若关闭撤销功能则为38%）。尽管CHERI的防护效果略逊于Rust，但其在内核中启用所需的开发工作量要低得多。

title: Service-Based Village Information System with Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chatbot
authors: Murhadi, Wahju Tjahjo Saputro, Hamid Muhammad Jumasa, Ike Yunia Pasa, Dewi Chirzah, Hanifatus Sa'diah
publish: 2025 International Conference on ICT for Smart Society (ICISS)
abstract: This study presents the development of a services-based Village Information System (VIS) integrated with an AI-powered chatbot to enhance public service delivery in Krandegan Village, Central Java. The methodology includes problem identification, technology selection, system design, user interface development, and scenario-based testing. The system leverages Large Language Models (LLMs), specifically OpenAI's GPT-4, and incorporates components such as a conversational interface, knowledge store, conversation logic, and a vector-based database for storing training data. The chatbot was trained using crawled data from the official village website to ensure domain relevance. System testing was conducted using formal Indonesian, everyday language, English, and Javanese to assess its adaptability and inclusiveness. Results show that the chatbot is capable of accurately responding to diverse queries while providing access to official links and communication channels such as WhatsApp. A key limitation of the system is its dependence on the knowledge base; it cannot answer questions outside the scope of the training data. This limitation can be addressed through periodic updates and the inclusion of more comprehensive data.
title_zh: 基于服务的乡村信息系统与人工智能聊天机器人
abstract_zh: 本研究介绍了在中爪哇省克兰德甘村（Krandegan Village）开发一种基于服务的村庄信息系统（VIS），并集成人工智能驱动的聊天机器人，以提升公共服务的提供效率。研究方法包括问题识别、技术选型、系统设计、用户界面开发以及基于场景的测试。该系统利用大型语言模型（LLMs），特别是OpenAI的GPT-4，并整合了对话界面、知识库、对话逻辑以及基于向量的数据库，用于存储训练数据。聊天机器人通过从村庄官方网站爬取的数据进行训练，以确保其在特定领域的相关性。系统测试采用了正式印尼语、日常用语、英语和爪哇语，以评估其适应性和包容性。结果显示，该聊天机器人能够准确回应多样化的问题，并提供官方链接及WhatsApp等沟通渠道的访问。系统的一个主要局限是其对知识库的依赖性，无法回答超出训练数据范围的问题。这一局限可通过定期更新和引入更全面的数据来逐步解决。

title: Function-level Optimization Automatic Tuner for Numerical Programs
authors: Xinni Liu, Xinpeng Li, Guangping Yu, Hengbiao Yu, Xin Yi, Chun Huang
abstract: Numerical programs are widely used in high-performance computing, graphics, finance, deep learning, and other fields. The use of high-precision floating-point numbers can ensure the accuracy and robustness of the program and reduce the accumulation of errors. However, this approach also increases the program’s execution time, memory usage, and energy consumption. Therefore, the reasonable use of mixed precision is beneficial to balance the accuracy and performance of program results. To look for efficient mixed-precision configurations, we propose an LLVM toolchain, FuncTuner, that obtains the program transformation range by identifying the #pragma directive in the front end of Clang, uses a recursive search algorithm to access the configuration information of functions in the range, and uses LLVM Pass to modify the LLVM IR of the program according to the given configuration, pioneering the use of function-level mixed-precision optimization. Our approach achieves significant results in the HPL-AI program, with a maximum floating-point performance of 24.78 GFLOPs at fp16 precision and a performance improvement of 304.73 % at the max scale.
title_zh: 数值程序的函数级优化自动调优器
abstract_zh: 数值程序广泛应用于高性能计算、图形处理、金融分析、深度学习等领域。使用高精度浮点数可以保证程序的准确性与鲁棒性，减少误差累积。然而，这种方法也会增加程序的执行时间、内存占用和能耗。因此，合理采用混合精度技术有助于在程序精度与性能之间取得良好平衡。为寻找高效的混合精度配置，我们提出了一种基于LLVM工具链的优化工具FuncTuner。该工具通过在Clang前端识别#pragma指令，确定程序的变换范围；采用递归搜索算法获取该范围内函数的配置信息；并利用LLVM Pass根据给定配置修改程序的LLVM中间表示（IR），首次实现了函数级别的混合精度优化。在HPL-AI程序上的实验结果表明，该方法在fp16精度下最高达到24.78 GFLOPs的浮点性能，且在最大规模下性能提升达304.73%。

title: No atomics, no problem. Developing a RAG pipeline for shared CXL memory
authors: Alfred Bratterud, Gisle Dankel, Amin Farajianzadeh, John Groves, Chengyi Juan, Joshua Sutterlein, Andrés Márquez, Petter Gustad, Arnt Emil Ingulstad
abstract: We share early experiments with software development for shared CXL memory on the H3 Falcon C5022 CXL switch. We describe how the different stages in the development of a commercial RAG pipeline were impacted by the presence of CXL memory. All of Wikipedia is split into 46 million text passages which are embedded into a high-dimensional embedding space and subjected to heavy load in single-and multi-host experiments. We observe significant performance advantages available to DuckDB and Faiss without changing the software; we measure up to 12× latency reduction with real workloads and 40× reduction with synthetic workloads on CXL, compared to the same queries run with demand paging on NVMe. We explain the current challenges of working with two disjoint cache coherency domains and explain how the Fabric-Attached Memory File System (famfs) and famfs producer-consumer queues provide synchronization patterns without atomic operations on current ×86 CPUs. We then discuss open challenges remaining for high performance atomics and locking mechanisms in shared memory. Lastly we show how famfs page-level interleaving enables near-linear throughput scaling when a second host serves queries from the same Faiss index on shared fabric-attached memory and how shared memory allocations can be orchestrated by Kubernetes in a full vertical RAG deployment.
title_zh: 无需原子操作，问题不大。为共享CXL内存开发RAG流水线
abstract_zh: 我们分享了在H3 Falcon C5022 CXL交换机上，针对共享CXL内存的软件开发早期实验。我们描述了在构建商业级RAG（检索增强生成）流水线过程中，不同开发阶段如何受到CXL内存存在的影响。整个维基百科内容被拆分为4600万段文本，这些文本被嵌入到高维嵌入空间中，并在单主机和多主机实验中承受高强度负载。我们观察到，无需修改软件，DuckDB和Faiss均获得了显著的性能提升：在真实工作负载下，CXL相比使用NVMe按需分页的相同查询，延迟最高降低12倍；在合成工作负载下，延迟最高降低40倍。我们解释了当前在两个独立缓存一致性域之间协作所面临的挑战，并说明了基于Fabric-Attached Memory File System（famfs）及其生产者-消费者队列如何在当前x86 CPU上无需原子操作即可提供同步模式。随后，我们讨论了在共享内存中实现高性能原子操作和锁机制仍存在的开放性挑战。最后，我们展示了famfs的页面级交错机制如何使第二个主机在共享的fabric-attached内存上从同一Faiss索引中服务查询时，实现接近线性的吞吐量扩展；同时，我们还展示了在完整的垂直RAG部署中，Kubernetes如何协调共享内存的分配。

title: SBR-RAG: Efficient Subgraph-Based RAG with Lightweight Filter
authors: Xinda Chu, Lan Ma, Jincheng Bao, Fan Duo, Yuanyuan Qiao
publish: 2025 9th IEEE International Conference on Network Intelligence and Digital Content (IC-NIDC)
abstract: Contemporary artificial intelligence (AI), particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), focuses on emulating human capabilities for knowledge acquisition and utilization. Relying solely on pre-training data is insufficient for up-to-date knowledge access, yet continuously retraining or fine-tuning LLMs with internal data is impractical. Many existing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) [1], [2], [3], [4] methods significantly enhance LLMs' access to external knowledge through vector-based or graph-structured retrieval from knowledge bases. However, the complexity and diversity of real-world knowledge bases hinder RAG systems from effectively retrieving complex multi-hop data and abstractly related information; moreover, increased volumes of erroneous retrieved data readily induce LLM hallucinations. To address these limitations, we propose SBR-RAG, a knowledge retrieval and filtering framework. SBR-RAG identifies relevant documents within a query-relevant subgraph and employs a lightweight discriminator for filtering, significantly improving accuracy while mitigating hallucinations. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior Recall and F1 scores across multiple public datasets, demonstrating superior performance over many existing strong baselines.
title_zh: SBR-RAG：基于轻量级过滤的高效子图检索增强生成
abstract_zh: 当代人工智能（AI），尤其是大型语言模型（LLMs），主要致力于模拟人类在知识获取与应用方面的能力。仅依赖预训练数据难以实现对最新知识的访问，而持续使用内部数据对LLM进行重新训练或微调又不切实际。现有的许多检索增强生成（RAG）方法[1]，[2]，[3]，[4]通过从知识库中基于向量或图结构进行检索，显著提升了LLM对外部知识的访问能力。然而，现实世界知识库的复杂性与多样性使得RAG系统在有效检索复杂多跳信息及抽象关联信息方面面临挑战；此外，大量错误检索数据极易引发LLM产生幻觉。为解决上述问题，我们提出SBR-RAG——一种知识检索与过滤框架。SBR-RAG通过识别查询相关子图中的相关文档，并采用轻量级判别器进行过滤，显著提升了检索准确性，同时有效缓解了幻觉问题。实验结果表明，我们的方法在多个公开数据集上均取得了优于现有多种强基线模型的召回率（Recall）和F1分数，展现出卓越的性能。

title: Investigating Evolutionary Characteristics of Deep Learning Framework Bugs in the Large Language Model Era
authors: Kaishen Xie, Jiale Shen, Hao Zhou, Fuyang Li
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Big Data and Smart Computing (BigComp)
abstract: Since ChatGPT’s release in November 2022, deep learning frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow have undergone extensive updates to support the transition from traditional pre-trained models to large language models (LLMs). To investigate how framework bugs have evolved in this new era, we conducted a large-scale empirical study analyzing 552 bugs from these two frameworks spanning December 2022 to September 2025. We categorized bugs using a comprehensive taxonomy covering 13 root cause types and 6 symptom categories. Our findings reveal significant distributional shifts in bug characteristics driven by the adaptation to LLMs, providing actionable insights for framework testing and maintenance in the evolving landscape of deep learning infrastructure.
title_zh: 大语言模型时代深度学习框架漏洞的演化特征研究
abstract_zh: 自2022年11月ChatGPT发布以来，PyTorch和TensorFlow等深度学习框架经历了广泛更新，以支持从传统预训练模型向大语言模型（LLMs）的转型。为探究在此新阶段框架缺陷的演变情况，我们开展了一项大规模实证研究，分析了2022年12月至2025年9月期间这两个框架中552个缺陷。我们采用一个涵盖13种根本原因类型和6类症状表现的综合性分类体系对缺陷进行归类。研究结果揭示了在适应大语言模型过程中，缺陷特征分布发生了显著变化，为深度学习基础设施不断演进背景下的框架测试与维护提供了切实可行的洞察。

title: XRepair - Unifying Retrieval, Repair, and Evaluation for Explainable LLM-Based Vulnerability Fixes
authors: Alfred Amoah, Yan Liu
abstract: This paper presents XRepair, a web-based tool for automated and explainable software vulnerability repair. XRepair integrates retrieval, generation, and evaluation into a single interactive framework. It augments large language models (LLMs) with knowledge retrieved from CWE/CVE datasets through both embedding-based and graph-based strategies. XRepair enables repairs that are contextualized with vulnerability metadata and related examples. The tool provides end-to-end functionalities, including users inputting a CWE/CVE identifier and vulnerable code snippet, configuring the retrieval strategy and LLM, and receiving repair recommendations. Unlike patch-only systems, the recommendations consist of an issue description, explicit repair guidance, and concrete code diffs. To assess repair quality, XRepair incorporates an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation framework that scores outputs across five criteria, namely relevance, completeness, correctness, identification of vulnerable code, and guidance. This design supports reproducible comparison of retrieval strategies and produces transparent recommendations. Built using both the strategy and factory design patterns, XRepair allows new retrieval algorithms and data sources to be added. The tool and documentation are publicly available with a tool for comparative evaluation and practical application of explainable vulnerability repairs. The demo for XRepair can be accessed at https://youtu.be/5IcGzNJXAY.
title_zh: XRepair - 用于可解释的基于大语言模型漏洞修复的检索、修复与评估统一框架
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了XRepair，一个基于Web的自动化且可解释的软件漏洞修复工具。XRepair将检索、生成与评估整合到一个统一的交互式框架中。它通过基于嵌入和基于图的策略，将从CWE/CVE数据集中检索到的知识增强大型语言模型（LLMs）。XRepair能够生成结合漏洞元数据和相关示例的上下文化修复方案。该工具提供端到端功能：用户输入CWE/CVE标识符和存在漏洞的代码片段，配置检索策略和LLM参数，并接收修复建议。与仅提供补丁的系统不同，XRepair的建议包含问题描述、明确的修复指导以及具体的代码差异（code diffs）。为评估修复质量，XRepair引入了一种“大模型作为裁判”（LLM-as-a-Judge）的评估框架，从五个维度对输出进行评分：相关性、完整性、正确性、漏洞代码识别能力以及修复指导质量。该设计支持检索策略的可复现比较，并生成透明的修复建议。XRepair采用策略模式和工厂模式构建，便于新增检索算法和数据源。该工具及其文档已公开，配套提供用于对比评估和实际应用可解释漏洞修复的工具。XRepair的演示视频可访问：https://youtu.be/5IcGzNJXAY。

title: CAMUS: Context-Aware Neural Mutation Selection
authors: Mingda Chen, Bo Wang, Youfang Lin, Jie M. Zhang
abstract: Mutation analysis is a fundamental technique in software engineering, playing a vital role in software testing and debugging. It introduces small artificial faults (mutants) into a program to simulate realistic defects. These mutants are systematically injected and then leveraged in downstream tasks such as mutation testing, mutation-based fault localization (MBFL), and mutation-based test case prioritization (MBTCP). However, all of these applications require generating and executing a large number of mutants, leading to substantial computational overhead. This scalability issue significantly limits the applicability of mutation analysis to large-scale software systems. To address this challenge, we propose CAMUS, a context-aware neural mutation selection approach. CAMUS models each mutation and its surrounding context as a graph enriched with AST hierarchy and type information. It then employs an encoder with self-attention mechanisms to produce embeddings, from which the selection probability of each mutant is predicted. We evaluate CAMUS on three downstream tasks, i.e., mutation testing, MBFL, and MBTCP, by comparing it with state-of-the-art mutation selection techniques, including the recent large language model DeepSeek-v3. Experiments are conducted on the Defects4J 2.0 and ConDefects benchmarks. Our results show that CAMUS consistently outperforms existing methods across a wide range of mutation retention rates. In mutation testing, CAMUS achieves over 95% accuracy using only 50% of the mutants. In MBTCP, it reaches near-optimal prioritization performance with as little as 5% of the mutants, demonstrating its strong efficiency and effectiveness.
title_zh: 卡姆斯：上下文感知的神经变异选择
abstract_zh: 变异分析是软件工程中的基础技术，在软件测试与调试中发挥着至关重要的作用。该技术通过向程序中引入微小的人工故障（即变异体）来模拟真实缺陷，这些变异体被系统性地注入，并用于后续任务，如变异测试、基于变异的故障定位（MBFL）以及基于变异的测试用例优先级排序（MBTCP）。然而，上述所有应用均需生成并执行大量变异体，导致显著的计算开销。这一可扩展性问题严重限制了变异分析在大规模软件系统中的实际应用。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了CAMUS——一种上下文感知的神经变异选择方法。CAMUS将每个变异体及其周围上下文建模为一个图结构，该图融合了抽象语法树（AST）的层次信息与类型信息。随后，利用具备自注意力机制的编码器生成嵌入表示，并据此预测每个变异体被选中的概率。我们在三个下游任务——变异测试、MBFL和MBTCP上对CAMUS进行了评估，将其与当前最先进的变异选择技术（包括近期的大型语言模型DeepSeek-v3）进行了对比。实验基于Defects4J 2.0和ConDefects两个基准数据集展开。结果表明，CAMUS在多种变异保留率下均持续优于现有方法。在变异测试中，仅使用50%的变异体即可达到超过95%的准确率；在MBTCP任务中，仅需5%的变异体即可实现接近最优的优先级排序性能，充分展现了其卓越的效率与有效性。

title: Dynamic Path-Controllable Deep Unfolding Networks with Planet Optimization: A Scalable and Efficient Approach for Software Defect Detection
authors: Kevin N. Shah, Chandrasekhar Rao Katru, Umesh Kulkarni, Jay Gandhi, D. Kavitha, Ramya Maranan
publish: 2025 International Conference on Intelligent Computing, Information and Control Systems (ICOIICS)
